overview.description: Custom machine learning solutions and consulting for businesses
overview.description_long: Since 2017, bohem.ai has provided tailored machine learning (ML) solutions designed to empower businesses and drive measurable results. Services cover identifying high-impact ML opportunities, creating custom MLOps strategies, facilitating hardware acquisition, designing and training ML models, and providing deployment and ongoing support. The team brings 15+ years of hands-on ML experience.
overview.tagline: Elevate your business with custom machine learning solutions

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague in March 2017 as a boutique ML consulting firm

metadata.notes: Small boutique ML consulting firm. Czech business registry (ARES) ICO: 05975905, registered 2017-03-30, address: Strančická 3339/41, Praha 10. Clients identified from homepage logo images: ČEPS (Czech electricity grid operator), Tolion Health, GAPP System. No CNAIP entry found. Website is a single-page WordPress site with no team or careers pages.
